# TarotAxis

> TarotAxis is a free AI-assisted tarot reading website for self-reflection. Visitors can draw a three-card spread and receive a personalised interpretation streamed by Anthropic Claude, look up the meaning of any of the 78 Rider–Waite–Smith cards, get a daily card, or ask a yes/no question. The site is bilingual (English and Spanish) and frames tarot as a mirror for reflection, not fortune-telling.

Important notes:

- TarotAxis is not a divination or fortune-telling service. The readings explicitly avoid hard predictions and never give medical, legal, financial, or relationship-leaving advice.
- The AI reading tier uses Anthropic Claude (Haiku 4.5 for the lightweight surfaces, Sonnet 4.6 for the deeper spread analysis). Anonymous visitors get 1 AI reading per day per browser; registered (Google OAuth) users get 5 per day.
- The card corpus is the standard 78-card Rider–Waite–Smith deck. Every card has an upright meaning, reversed meaning, and keyword sets in both English and Spanish.
- Every English URL has a Spanish counterpart under `/es/` with a localised slug (for example `/free-reading` ↔ `/es/lectura-gratis`).
- Site canonical: `https://tarotaxis.com`. Spanish root: `https://tarotaxis.com/es`.

## Core experiences

- [Homepage (EN)](https://tarotaxis.com/): Overview of the free AI tarot reading, daily card, and card library.
- [Free AI tarot reading (EN)](https://tarotaxis.com/free-reading): Draw three cards and receive an AI-generated interpretation. Anonymous users get 1/day, registered 5/day.
- [Reading analysis (EN)](https://tarotaxis.com/reading-analysis): Enter a spread you drew elsewhere and get an AI synthesis of the cards.
- [Daily card (EN)](https://tarotaxis.com/daily): Today's card with upright/reversed meaning and a short AI reflection.
- [Yes / No oracle (EN)](https://tarotaxis.com/yes-no): Single-card yes/no answer.
- [Card combination explorer (EN)](https://tarotaxis.com/combination): Choose any two cards and read what their pairing tends to signal.
- [Tarot personality quiz (EN)](https://tarotaxis.com/quiz): Short questionnaire that returns a card archetype.
- [Birth card calculator (EN)](https://tarotaxis.com/birth-card): Numerology-based personal card from date of birth.
- [Manifestation with tarot (EN)](https://tarotaxis.com/manifestation): Card pulls framed around intention-setting.
- [Zodiac and tarot (EN)](https://tarotaxis.com/zodiac): Each zodiac sign's associated tarot cards.

## Card and spread libraries

- [All 78 tarot cards (EN)](https://tarotaxis.com/cards): Index of every card with upright and reversed keywords. Per-card pages live at `/cards/{slug}` (for example `/cards/the-fool`).
- [All tarot spreads (EN)](https://tarotaxis.com/spreads): Index of supported spreads — three-card, Celtic cross, horseshoe, love, career, soulmate, full/new/dark/eclipse/waning moon, healing after heartbreak, "how they feel about me", "should I stay or should I go", third party, true love, partner, by-card-count.
- [Tarot suits (EN)](https://tarotaxis.com/tarot-suits): Wands, cups, swords, pentacles — what each suit represents.
- [Tarot decks (EN)](https://tarotaxis.com/tarot-decks): Overview of supported decks (Rider–Waite–Smith, pastel, etc.).

## Guides and editorial

- [How to read tarot (EN)](https://tarotaxis.com/how-to-read-tarot): Step-by-step beginner method.
- [Tarot for beginners (EN)](https://tarotaxis.com/tarot-for-beginners): Entry-level explainer.
- [How to shuffle tarot cards (EN)](https://tarotaxis.com/how-to-shuffle-tarot): Shuffling techniques and when to use each.
- [How to cleanse tarot cards (EN)](https://tarotaxis.com/how-to-cleanse-tarot-cards): Cleansing rituals and practical care.
- [How to ask tarot questions (EN)](https://tarotaxis.com/how-to-ask-tarot-questions): How to phrase questions so the spread is useful.
- [Oracle vs tarot (EN)](https://tarotaxis.com/oracle-vs-tarot): Difference between oracle decks and tarot decks.
- [Keeping a tarot journal (EN)](https://tarotaxis.com/tarot-journal): Why and how to journal your readings.
- [Methodology (EN)](https://tarotaxis.com/methodology): How TarotAxis approaches card meanings, the AI reading prompts, and editorial standards.
- [About (EN)](https://tarotaxis.com/about): What TarotAxis is and who it is for.

## Spanish (Español)

- [Inicio (ES)](https://tarotaxis.com/es): Página principal en español.
- [Lectura gratuita de IA (ES)](https://tarotaxis.com/es/lectura-gratis): Lectura de tres cartas con interpretación generada por IA.
- [Análisis de lectura (ES)](https://tarotaxis.com/es/reading-analysis): Análisis de IA para una tirada que ya realizaste.
- [Carta del día (ES)](https://tarotaxis.com/es/carta-del-dia): La carta de hoy con su interpretación.
- [Oráculo sí o no (ES)](https://tarotaxis.com/es/si-no): Respuesta sí/no con una sola carta.
- [Combinaciones de cartas (ES)](https://tarotaxis.com/es/combinaciones): Explorador de pares de cartas.
- [Todas las 78 cartas (ES)](https://tarotaxis.com/es/cartas): Índice completo en español, con páginas individuales en `/es/cartas/{slug}`.
- [Tiradas de tarot (ES)](https://tarotaxis.com/es/tiradas): Índice de todas las tiradas.
- [Palos del tarot (ES)](https://tarotaxis.com/es/palos-del-tarot): Bastos, copas, espadas y oros.
- [Barajas de tarot (ES)](https://tarotaxis.com/es/barajas-de-tarot): Visión general de las barajas.
- [Carta de nacimiento (ES)](https://tarotaxis.com/es/carta-de-nacimiento): Carta personal basada en la fecha de nacimiento.
- [Manifestación (ES)](https://tarotaxis.com/es/manifestacion): Tirada enfocada a la intención.
- [Zodiaco y tarot (ES)](https://tarotaxis.com/es/zodiaco): Correspondencias entre signos y cartas.
- [Cómo leer el tarot (ES)](https://tarotaxis.com/es/como-leer-tarot): Guía paso a paso.
- [Tarot para principiantes (ES)](https://tarotaxis.com/es/tarot-para-principiantes): Introducción.
- [Cómo barajar el tarot (ES)](https://tarotaxis.com/es/como-barajar-tarot): Técnicas de barajado.
- [Cómo limpiar las cartas (ES)](https://tarotaxis.com/es/como-limpiar-cartas-de-tarot): Limpieza energética y cuidado de la baraja.
- [Cómo preguntar al tarot (ES)](https://tarotaxis.com/es/como-preguntar-al-tarot): Cómo formular preguntas útiles.
- [Oráculo vs tarot (ES)](https://tarotaxis.com/es/oraculo-vs-tarot): Diferencias entre oráculos y tarot.
- [Diario de tarot (ES)](https://tarotaxis.com/es/diario-de-tarot): Por qué y cómo llevar un diario.
- [Metodología (ES)](https://tarotaxis.com/es/metodologia): Cómo TarotAxis construye los significados y los prompts de IA.
- [Acerca de (ES)](https://tarotaxis.com/es/acerca-de): Qué es TarotAxis.

## Site index

- [XML sitemap](https://tarotaxis.com/sitemap.xml): Full machine-readable list of all indexable pages in both locales.

## Optional

- [Pricing (EN)](https://tarotaxis.com/pricing) · [Precios (ES)](https://tarotaxis.com/es/precios): Tier overview. Core experiences are free; a premium tier is in development.
- [Privacy policy (EN)](https://tarotaxis.com/privacy) · [Política de privacidad (ES)](https://tarotaxis.com/es/privacidad)
- [Terms of service (EN)](https://tarotaxis.com/terms) · [Términos (ES)](https://tarotaxis.com/es/terminos)
- [Account (EN)](https://tarotaxis.com/account) · [Cuenta (ES)](https://tarotaxis.com/es/account): Signed-in dashboard; sign-in is via Google OAuth at `/auth/signin`.
- [Journal (EN)](https://tarotaxis.com/journal) · [Diario (ES)](https://tarotaxis.com/es/journal): Saved readings for signed-in users, with a local-storage fallback for guests.
